sentence: 这部电影的主题曲听了让人很感动。
pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng de zhǔ tí qū tīng le ràng rén hěn gǎn dòng.
english: The theme song of this film is very moving to listen to.

sentence: 大学第一年我们要学电学基础知识。
pinyin: Dà xué dì yī nián wǒ men yào xué diàn xué jī chǔ zhī shi.
english: In the first year of university, we have to study the basics of electrical engineering.

meaning: abbr. for 信報財經新聞|信报财经新闻, Hong Kong Economic Journal
sentence: 他每天早上都买一份信报看财经新闻。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang dōu mǎi yī fèn xìn bào kàn cái jīng xīn wén.
english: He buys a copy of the Hong Kong Economic Journal every morning to read the financial news.

sentence: 闯红灯是犯法的，你要小心。
pinyin: Chuǎng hóng dēng shì fàn fǎ de, nǐ yào xiǎo xīn.
english: Running a red light is breaking the law; you need to be careful.

meaning: to seek investment or funding; investment promotion
sentence: 市政府今年加大力度招商引资。
pinyin: Shì zhèng fǔ jīn nián jiā dà lì dù zhāo shāng yǐn zī.
english: The city government is stepping up its investment promotion efforts this year.
